description: Tracksuit has a white jacket with mock collar and a full zippered front, long sleeves with light blue panels and elasticated cuffs, embroidered brand logo on the left chest, two insert pockets on the sides with zippered closure, elasticated hemline, mesh liningNavy blue track pants with breathable mesh lining, elasticated waistband with concealed drawstrings, two insert pockets on the sides, embroidered brand logo on the left, light blue panels on the sides, concealed drawstrings at hem
